title: Masina Hospital | Mumbai's Oldest Charitable trust & Multispeciality Hospital | Experience Unmatched Excellence | Serving India for 120 years.
description: Established in 1902, Masina Hospital Trust is a leading multi-disciplinary medical hospital in Mumbai. With top-tier doctors, advanced technology, and green initiatives, we offer holistic Multispeciality healthcare solutions. From physical to mental health, we provide care across 45+ departments. Our legacy hospital is housed on an 8-acre green campus in Byculla, South Mumbai. We are famous for our commitment to community service and healthcare, our excellent staff and qualified consultants.

Try Again SIGN UP NOW Easy and Simple Trading Tools SIGN UP NOW Easy and Simple Trading Tools WELCOME TO MASINA HOSPITAL At Masina Hospital, technology and excellent medical care, blend in with our legacy of service and our passion for improving the quality of life.   We continue to undergo a complete modernization while still rooted in our values of selfless service, and moral and ethical standards.  Our website is a celebration of our vast multispecialty space and our holistic approach to medical care. Leading Experts Mumbai’s leading specialists are now part of our full-time roster and empanelled consultant network, strengthening clinical excellence across departments. Advanced Technology We continue to invest in cutting-edge medical technology and modern infrastructure to deliver accurate diagnosis and advanced treatment outcomes. Holistic Care With 40+ dedicated departments and multidisciplinary expertise, we provide integrated healthcare solutions under one roof. Legacy of Trust For 120 years, Masina Hospital has combined compassionate care, ethical medical practice and community service for generations of patients.
